case_title: MARTIN AGUILAR VS. STEFANIE MARTIN DBA MARTIN LAW FIRM

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, MARTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEFANIE MARTIN DBA MARTIN LAW FIRM PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH HIS CLAIM OF MALPRACTICE OR THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT DO THE WORK HE PAID FOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED NOV-14-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STEFANIE MARTIN DBA MARTIN LAW FIRM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF MARTIN AGUILAR IS PRESENT, ASSITED BY NINA SAFDIE, CERTIFED SPANISH INTERPRTER. DEFENDANT STEFANIE MARTIN DBA MARIN LAW FIRM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
